_comment: Editorial content lives here. Release version, date, download link, telegram, changelog etc. are fetched live at runtime from the URLs in 'remote' below and will override the matching fields here if the fetch succeeds. The fields under latestRelease/changelog/links act only as an offline fallback (e.g. if the remote source is briefly unreachable).

remote._comment: Live data sources for this device. Point these at your own plato.json / changelog.txt to switch devices.

rom.name: crDroid
rom.tagline: Custom Android firmware built for speed, privacy and a clean, distraction-free experience.

latestRelease.summary: The newest crDroid build for plato. See the full changelog below for everything that changed.

changes: Improved refresh rate behavior for smoother animations and scrolling
Enabled advanced ZRAM and UFS performance optimizations for better multitasking
Enabled Zero Shutter Lag (ZSL) support for faster camera capture

installSteps.title: Unlock the bootloader
installSteps.description: Enable Developer Options and USB debugging, then run adb reboot bootloader followed by fastboot flashing unlock. This will wipe your device.

installSteps.title: Download the build and recovery
installSteps.description: Grab the latest crDroid zip and a matching custom recovery image from the downloads section below.

installSteps.title: Flash a custom recovery
installSteps.description: Boot into fastboot mode and run fastboot flash recovery recovery.img to install the recovery image.

installSteps.title: Flash the crDroid build
installSteps.description: Reboot into recovery, select Apply update, and choose the zip you downloaded. Optionally flash GApps in the same session.

installSteps.title: Reboot into crDroid
installSteps.description: Return to the main recovery menu and select Reboot system now. First boot can take a few minutes — this is normal.
